headline: Did Winning Complex I-290 Tunneling Work Just Shift Jacobs Solutions' (J) Infrastructure Investment Narrative?
summary: In April 2026, the Illinois Department of Transportation selected Jacobs Solutions for two projects to modernize the I-290 (Eisenhower Expressway) corridor near Chicago, including design and project management for a key railroad bridge replacement and oversight of a new supplemental storm sewer installed by tunneling beneath the highway. This work highlights Jacobs’ specialized capabilities in complex transportation, freight rail interfaces, and underground infrastructure, reinforcing its...

headline: A Look At Jacobs Solutions (J) Valuation As Shares Track A Flat One Year Performance
summary: Why Jacobs Solutions stock is drawing attention now Jacobs Solutions (J) has been on some investors’ radar after recent share performance, with the stock roughly flat over the past year but showing mixed moves over the week, month, and past 3 months. In that context, the company’s US$12.4b revenue base, US$459.4m in net income, and value score of 3 are giving investors more concrete fundamentals to compare with the recent price action.
